_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
No `Validation=` attribute appears in actual Razor files. Design documents reference it as an aspirational pattern, but the live implementation follows a different approach.

The live validation pattern uses `@bind-IsValid` with `await _form.Validate()` for client-side checks, `ValidateAndThrowAsync` in server handlers, and `catch (FluentValidation.ValidationException)` in UI components. A recommended location for a new shared DateOnly component would be `src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/DesignSystem/Components/Forms/`, though design system docs advise against wrapping raw `MudDatePicker` inputs to avoid unnecessary indirection.

A DateOnly-specific component would centralize the repeated DateTime-to-DateOnly conversion logic currently duplicated across ten-plus locations. This differs from a generic wrapper because it encodes Belgian formatting policy and conversion helpers. The DesignSystem/Components/Forms/ directory already contains AppFieldLabel, AppFormSection, AppSaveCancelBar, and AppSearchBar.

No `Components/Shared` folder exists; feature-specific components live under `Features/*/Components/`. `AppSearchBar` already wraps `MudTextField` with policy logic such as debounce and adornments. The recommended path is `DesignSystem/Components/Forms/AppDateField.razor` to follow the `App*` naming convention. Shared form components are imported globally through `_Imports.razor`.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

## 1. MudBlazor date picker usage

**Pattern:** Every date field uses raw `MudDatePicker` bound to `DateTime?`, then converts to `DateOnly` when calling handlers/APIs. There is no shared date component today.

**Files using `MudDatePicker`:**

| File | Field |
|------|-------|
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Pages/RegistrationCaseDetail.razor` | Date of birth |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/HouseholdStep.razor` | Date of birth |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/CivilStatusStep.razor` | Marriage date |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/ResidenceStep.razor` | Valid from, valid until, decision date |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/NationalRegisterSearchDialog.razor` | Date of birth |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/BirthDeclaration/Pages/BirthDeclarationCaseDetail.razor` | Date of birth |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/BirthDeclaration/Components/ParentLinkDialog.razor` | Date of birth |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/ChangeOfAddress/Pages/ChangeOfAddressCaseDetail.razor` | Effective date |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/ChangeOfAddress/Components/OpenChangeOfAddressDialog.razor` | Date of birth |

**Typical markup:**

```68:68:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/HouseholdStep.razor
<MudDatePicker @bind-Date="_newBirthDate" Label="Date of birth" Required="true" MaxDate="DateTime.Today" />
```

**State + conversion pattern (repeated everywhere):**

```126:126:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/HouseholdStep.razor
private DateTime? _newBirthDate;
```

```172:176:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/HouseholdStep.razor
_members.Add(new MemberDraft(
    _newGivenName!,
    _newFamilyName!,
    DateOnly.FromDateTime(_newBirthDate.Value),
    _newRole.Value));
```

**Loading `DateOnly` from DTOs back into the picker:**

```643:643:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Pages/RegistrationCaseDetail.razor
_birthDate = _case.Person.BirthDate.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue);
```

```260:260:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/ChangeOfAddress/Pages/ChangeOfAddressCaseDetail.razor
_effectiveDate = _case.EffectiveDate?.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue) ?? DateTime.Today;
```

**Design-system guidance** (not yet applied in code):

```75:75:docs/design-system/03-component-catalogue.md
| Date picker | `MudDatePicker` | `Editable="true"`, `DateFormat="dd/MM/yyyy"`, `PickerVariant.Dialog` on mobile | Belgian format everywhere |
```

`docs/design-system/05-ui-kit.md` says raw `MudDatePicker` is acceptable, but a DateOnly bridge would centralize repeated conversion logic.

---

## 2. Shared components location and structure

**No `Components/Shared/` folder exists.** Components are organized in three layers:

| Layer | Path | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| App shell | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Components/` | Layout (`MainLayout.razor`), routing (`Routes.razor`), pages (`Pages/Home.razor`) |
| Design system | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/DesignSystem/Components/` | Reusable `App*` wrappers by category |
| Feature-local | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/{Feature}/Components/` | Domain-specific UI (e.g. `HouseholdStep.razor`, `ParentLinkDialog.razor`) |

**Design system form components** (`DesignSystem/Components/Forms/`):

- `AppFieldLabel.razor` — standalone label with required marker
- `AppFormSection.razor` — titled form group with `MudGrid`
- `AppSaveCancelBar.razor` — save/cancel action bar
- `AppSearchBar.razor` — debounced search field wrapper

**Global imports** (design system forms are available app-wide):

```9:10:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Components/_Imports.razor
@using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web.DesignSystem.Components.Forms
@using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web.DesignSystem.Components.Layout
```

---

## 3. FluentValidation integration

**Architecture:** Validation lives in the Web layer only. Domain uses invariants; UI does not wire FluentValidation into `MudForm` client-side.

**DI registration:**

```84:84:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Program.cs
builder.Services.AddValidatorsFromAssemblyContaining<OpenRegistrationCaseValidator>();
```

**Validator pattern** (co-located with request DTOs in feature slices):

```5:24:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/RecordIdentity/RecordIdentityValidator.cs
public sealed class RecordIdentityValidator : AbstractValidator<RecordIdentityRequest>
{
    public RecordIdentityValidator()
    {
        RuleFor(x => x.GivenName)
            .NotEmpty()
            .WithMessage("Given name is required.");
        // ...
        RuleFor(x => x.BirthDate)
            .LessThan(DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.UtcNow))
            .WithMessage("Birth date must be in the past.");
    }
}
```

**Handler validation** (`ValidateAndThrowAsync`):

```19:19:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/RecordIdentity/RecordIdentityHandler.cs
await validator.ValidateAndThrowAsync(request, cancellationToken);
```

**Endpoint validation** (returns `ValidationProblem`):

```16:20:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/RecordIdentity/RecordIdentityEndpoint.cs
var validation = await validator.ValidateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
if (!validation.IsValid)
{
    return ValidationResults.ToProblemDetails(validation);
}
```

**Shared helper:**

```6:17:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Validation/ValidationResults.cs
public static class ValidationResults
{
    public static IResult ToProblemDetails(ValidationResult validationResult)
    {
        var errors = validationResult.Errors
            .GroupBy(e => e.PropertyName)
            .ToDictionary(
                g => g.Key,
                g => g.Select(e => e.ErrorMessage).ToArray());
        return Results.ValidationProblem(errors);
    }
}
```

**UI form validation** (actual pattern — not the design-doc adapter):

- `MudForm @ref="_form" @bind-IsValid="_formValid"`
- `await _form.Validate()` before submit
- MudBlazor `Required="true"` on fields
- Server errors caught as `FluentValidation.ValidationException`:

```281:284:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/CivilStatusStep.razor
catch (FluentValidation.ValidationException ex)
{
    Snackbar.Add(string.Join(" ", ex.Errors.Select(e => e.ErrorMessage)), Severity.Error);
}
```

**Note:** No `MudBlazor.FluentValidation` package and no `Validation=` attribute on any `.razor` file. The `Validation="_validator.ValidateValue"` pattern in `docs/design-system/06-page-templates.md` is aspirational; production code validates server-side in handlers.

**Date validators** (server-side, on `DateOnly` request fields):

- `RecordIdentityValidator.cs` — birth date in past
- `SearchNationalRegisterValidator.cs` — birth date rules
- `RecordResidencePermitValidator.cs` — valid-until in future
- `RecordImmigrationDecisionValidator.cs` — decision date ≤ today
- `RecordHouseholdCompositionValidator.cs` — member birth dates

---

## 4. Existing custom form field components

| Component | Path | Role |
|-----------|------|------|
| `AppFieldLabel` | `DesignSystem/Components/Forms/AppFieldLabel.razor` | Label for composite widgets |
| `AppFormSection` | `DesignSystem/Components/Forms/AppFormSection.razor` | Titled form section with grid |
| `AppSaveCancelBar` | `DesignSystem/Components/Forms/AppSaveCancelBar.razor` | Save/cancel buttons |
| `AppSearchBar` | `DesignSystem/Components/Forms/AppSearchBar.razor` | Debounced `MudTextField` wrapper |
| `DocumentUpload` | `Features/Registration/Components/DocumentUpload.razor` | File upload composite (feature-specific) |
| `MedicalDeclarationUpload` | `Features/BirthDeclaration/Components/MedicalDeclarationUpload.razor` | Birth-specific upload |

`AppSearchBar` is the closest precedent for a MudBlazor input wrapper with policy:

```3:16:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/DesignSystem/Components/Forms/AppSearchBar.razor
<MudTextField T="string"
              Value="@Value"
              ValueChanged="HandleValueChanged"
              Placeholder="@Placeholder"
              Variant="Variant.Outlined"
              Margin="Margin.Dense"
              ...
```

`AppForm` was explicitly rejected in `docs/design-system/05-ui-kit.md` — `MudForm` stays visible at call sites.

---

## Recommended location for a shared `DateOnly` component

**Path:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/DesignSystem/Components/Forms/AppDateField.razor`

**Rationale:**
1. Shared form wrappers live in `DesignSystem/Components/Forms/` and are globally imported.
2. Follows `App*` naming (`AppSearchBar`, `AppFieldLabel`).
3. Encodes policy the catalogue specifies (`DateFormat="dd/MM/yyyy"`, `Editable`, `MaxDate`) plus the repeated `DateOnly` ↔ `DateTime?` bridge.
4. Feature-specific dialogs (`ParentLinkDialog`, `NationalRegisterSearchDialog`) can reuse it without duplicating conversion logic.

**Suggested API shape:**

```razor
<AppDateField @bind-Value="_birthDate" Label="Date of birth" Required="true" MaxDate="@DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today)" />
```

Where `Value` is `DateOnly?` (two-way), internally wrapping `MudDatePicker` with `DateTime?` conversion — eliminating the `DateOnly.FromDateTime(...)` / `.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue)` boilerplate at every call site.

**Not recommended:** `Components/Shared/` (doesn't exist, breaks convention) or feature folders (too domain-specific for a cross-cutting date bridge).
